'''rayobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:llapaca|llapaca]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-y-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:llapaca|llapaca]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rayobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræyebeth|ræyebeth]] || [[word:ræyebej|ræyebej]] || [[word:ræyebesh|ræyebesh]] || [[word:ræyebe|ræyebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rayoyoboth|rayoyoboth]] || [[word:rayoyoboj|rayoyoboj]] || [[word:rayoyobosh|rayoyobosh]] || [[word:rayoyobo|rayoyobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rayoboth|rayoboth]] || [[word:rayoboj|rayoboj]] || [[word:rayobosh|rayobosh]] || [[word:rayobo|rayobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rayofboth|rayofboth]] || [[word:rayofboj|rayofboj]] || [[word:rayofbosh|rayofbosh]] || [[word:rayofbof|rayofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rayobotho|rayobotho]] || [[word:rayobojo|rayobojo]] || [[word:rayobosho|rayobosho]] || [[word:rayoboko|rayoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rayoboth|rayoboth]] || [[word:rayoboj|rayoboj]] || [[word:rayobosh|rayobosh]] || [[word:rayobo|rayobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rayobothol|rayobothol]] || [[word:rayobojol|rayobojol]] || [[word:rayoboshol|rayoboshol]] || [[word:rayobokol|rayobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rayobothotho|rayobothotho]] || [[word:rayobojojo|rayobojojo]] || [[word:rayoboshosho|rayoboshosho]] || [[word:rayoboko|rayoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rayobothon|rayobothon]] || [[word:rayobojon|rayobojon]] || [[word:rayoboshon|rayoboshon]] || [[word:rayobokon|rayobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rayobothoro|rayobothoro]] || [[word:rayobojoro|rayobojoro]] || [[word:rayoboshoro|rayoboshoro]] || [[word:rayobokoro|rayobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
